title: Classes, Private State, Inheritance, and Composition · Runtime Trace: Class Semantics
summary: Build maintainable scheduling components with explicit invariants and replaceable policies. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js class semantics increment in a policy-driven scheduling component library. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Explain classes as prototype-based constructs with strict bodies, constructors, methods, and fields.
Validate external keys and use safe containers or allowlists to prevent prototype-pollution paths.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
